title: IT毒專區 cpp 問題解答區 求高手

replies.msg:
有無人識operator overloading
點先可以簡化成件事
因為include 埋utility 同埋 rel_ops 都唔L明
仲徵緊資深IT毒阿 快啲入黎

#include "stdafx.h"
#include 
#include 

using namespace std;

class Box {
public:
    int length;
    int width;
    int depth;
    double volume;
    Box() : length(1),width(1),depth(1) {

    }
    explicit Box(int u) : length(u),width(u),depth(u) , volume(u*u*u){
        
    }
    explicit Box(int l, int w, int d) :length(l), width(w), depth(d), volume(l*w*d) {
    }
    bool operator<(const Box& b) {
        return this->volume < b.volume;
    }
    bool operator==(const Box& b) {
        return this->volume == b.volume;
    }

    bool operator<(const double value) {
        return this->volume < value;
    }
    bool operator==(const double value) {
        return this->volume == value;
    }
    bool operator<(const int value) {
        return this->volume < value;
    }
    bool operator==(const int value) {
        return this->volume == value;
    }
};
inline bool operator<(const int value, const Box& box) {
    return value < box.volume;
}
inline bool operator ==(const int value, const Box& box) {
    return value == box.volume;
}
//inline bool operator>(const int value, const Box& box) {
//    return value > box;
//}


int main()
{
    using namespace std::rel_ops;
    Box b{3};
    Box a{ 4 };
    cout << boolalpha << (4<=a);
    system("pause>nul");
    return 0;
}

no operator "<=" matches these operands
點解

int main()

no operator "<=" matches these operands
點解

replies.msg:
inline bool operator<=(const int value, const Box& box) { return value == box || value < box; }
你點解會認為個compiler會識幫你拆開黎做

#include "stdafx.h"
#include 
#include 

using namespace std;

class Box {
public:
    int length;
    int width;
    int depth;
    double volume;
    Box() : length(1),width(1),depth(1) {

    }
    explicit Box(int u) : length(u),width(u),depth(u) , volume(u*u*u){
        
    }
    explicit Box(int l, int w, int d) :length(l), width(w), depth(d), volume(l*w*d) {
    }
    bool operator<(const Box& b) {
        return this->volume < b.volume;
    }
    bool operator==(const Box& b) {
        return this->volume == b.volume;
    }

    bool operator<(const double value) {
        return this->volume < value;
    }
    bool operator==(const double value) {
        return this->volume == value;
    }
    bool operator<(const int value) {
        return this->volume < value;
    }
    bool operator==(const int value) {
        return this->volume == value;
    }
};
inline bool operator<(const int value, const Box& box) {
    return value < box.volume;
}
inline bool operator ==(const int value, const Box& box) {
    return value == box.volume;
}
//inline bool operator>(const int value, const Box& box) {
//    return value > box;
//}


int main()
{
    using namespace std::rel_ops;
    Box b{3};
    Box a{ 4 };
    cout << boolalpha << (4<=a);
    system("pause>nul");
    return 0;
}

no operator "<=" matches these operands
點解

inline bool operator<=(const int value, const Box& box) { return value == box || value < box; }
你點解會認為個compiler會識幫你拆開黎做
